fa-face-sunglasses.appearanceId: round face outline with two large oval or rectangular dark lenses resting on a small nose, suggesting sunglasses across the eyes; circular face shape wearing a pair of oversized shaded eyeglasses
fa-face-sunglasses.functionalityId: inserts a cool or confident sunglasses-wearing emoji reaction into a message; marks content with a stylish or laid-back sentiment
fa-face-sunglasses.intentId: express coolness, confidence, or a carefree attitude in a reaction; react to content with a relaxed and stylish emotion

fa-face-swear.appearanceId: round face outline with a scowling furrowed brow, and a mouth area replaced or covered by symbols such as asterisks or typographic glyphs representing censored profanity; circular face with angry eyes and grawlix symbols at the mouth
fa-face-swear.functionalityId: inserts a frustrated or profanity-implied reaction emoji into a message; marks content with a deeply irritated or cursing sentiment
fa-face-swear.intentId: express extreme frustration or censored anger in a reaction; react to aggravating content with a swearing emotion

fa-face-thermometer.appearanceId: round face outline with a small thermometer shape protruding from the mouth area and wavy or flushed lines suggesting fever; circular face shape with a temperature gauge inserted at the mouth
fa-face-thermometer.functionalityId: inserts a sick or feverish reaction emoji into a message; marks content with an illness or under-the-weather sentiment
fa-face-thermometer.intentId: express feeling sick, feverish, or unwell in a reaction; indicate illness or a temperature-related health state

fa-face-thinking.appearanceId: round face outline with one raised eyebrow, eyes looking upward or sideways, and a hand or finger touching the chin in a contemplative pose; circular face with a pensive upward gaze and thoughtful chin-touching gesture
fa-face-thinking.functionalityId: inserts a thinking or pondering reaction emoji into a message; marks content with a contemplative or evaluating sentiment
fa-face-thinking.intentId: express thoughtfulness, contemplation, or careful consideration; react to content with a reflective or evaluating emotion

fa-face-tissue.appearanceId: round face outline with a tissue or handkerchief pressed against the nose area and slightly red or watery eyes; circular face shape with a folded tissue held up to the nostrils
fa-face-tissue.functionalityId: inserts a crying, sneezing, or sick reaction emoji into a message; marks content with a tearful or congested sentiment
fa-face-tissue.intentId: express sadness, sneezing, or feeling unwell in a reaction; react to emotional or illness-related content with a tissue gesture

fa-face-tongue-money.appearanceId: round face outline with a tongue sticking out and a dollar sign or money symbol on or near the tongue, often with money-eyes; circular face shape with a protruding tongue bearing a currency symbol
fa-face-tongue-money.functionalityId: inserts a money-craving or greed-themed reaction emoji into a message; marks content with a financially excited or materialistic sentiment
fa-face-tongue-money.intentId: express excitement about money or a desire for financial gain; react to profitable or expensive content with a greedy delight

fa-face-tongue-sweat.appearanceId: round face outline with a tongue sticking out and a sweat droplet on the side of the face near the temple; circular face shape with a protruding tongue and a nervous sweat mark
fa-face-tongue-sweat.functionalityId: inserts an awkward, nervous, or playfully stressed reaction emoji into a message; marks content with a tense yet lighthearted sentiment
fa-face-tongue-sweat.intentId: express nervous awkwardness or playful embarrassment in a reaction; react to tricky or uncomfortable content with a tongue-out and sweat gesture

fa-face-unamused.appearanceId: round face outline with flat or slightly downward-angled eyes and a straight neutral or slightly downturned mouth expressing indifference; circular face with a deadpan or unimpressed expression
fa-face-unamused.functionalityId: inserts an unamused or unimpressed reaction emoji into a message; marks content with an indifferent or deadpan sentiment
fa-face-unamused.intentId: express boredom, indifference, or lack of amusement in a reaction; react to dull or unimpressive content with a flat expression

fa-face-viewfinder.appearanceId: round face outline with a square or rectangular viewfinder frame around or overlapping the face area, with corner bracket marks; circular face shape framed by a camera or scope targeting reticle
fa-face-viewfinder.functionalityId: activates facial recognition or face-framing detection in a camera interface; marks a face as the focus target in an image or video tool
fa-face-viewfinder.intentId: identify or frame a face using a camera or recognition tool; focus a camera or scanner on a person's face

fa-face-vomit.appearanceId: round face outline with a green or wavy squiggly stream emerging from a wide open disgusted mouth; circular face shape with bulging cheeks and a vomit arc exiting the mouth area
fa-face-vomit.functionalityId: inserts a disgusted or nauseated reaction emoji into a message; marks content with a revolted or deeply unpleasant sentiment
fa-face-vomit.intentId: express disgust, nausea, or extreme repulsion in a reaction; react to revolting or sickening content with a vomiting emotion

fa-face-weary.appearanceId: round face outline with heavy drooping eyelids, downward-slanting tired eyebrows, and a frowning open mouth as if exhaling or groaning; circular face with exhausted droopy eyes and a weary open-mouth grimace
fa-face-weary.functionalityId: inserts a weary or exhausted reaction emoji into a message; marks content with a drained or burned-out sentiment
fa-face-weary.intentId: express weariness, exhaustion, or being completely worn out; react to tiring or overwhelming content with a depleted emotion

fa-face-woozy.appearanceId: round face outline with dizzy spiral or cross-shaped eyes, a wavy unsteady mouth, and possibly rosy cheeks suggesting disorientation; circular face with swirly unfocused eyes and a wobbly expression
fa-face-woozy.functionalityId: inserts a dizzy, dazed, or woozy reaction emoji into a message; marks content with a disoriented or lightheaded sentiment
fa-face-woozy.intentId: express dizziness, disorientation, or feeling woozy in a reaction; react to overwhelming or confusing content with a dazed emotion

fa-face-worried.appearanceId: round face outline with raised inner eyebrows forming an anxious arch and a slight frown or wavy mouth suggesting concern; circular face with pinched worried brows and a tense downturned mouth
fa-face-worried.functionalityId: inserts a worried or anxious reaction emoji into a message; marks content with a concerned or apprehensive sentiment
fa-face-worried.intentId: express worry, concern, or anxious apprehension in a reaction; react to troubling or uncertain content with a fearful emotion

fa-face-zany.appearanceId: round face outline with one large spiral or wide-open eye, one normal eye, a wide grinning mouth with tongue out, and a generally chaotic expression; circular face with mismatched eyes and an unhinged grin
fa-face-zany.functionalityId: inserts a zany, wild, or silly reaction emoji into a message; marks content with a wacky or chaotically fun sentiment
fa-face-zany.intentId: express wild silliness or chaotic humor in a reaction; react to absurd or hilariously random content with a zany emotion

fa-face-zipper.appearanceId: round face outline with a zipper shape running horizontally across the mouth area, teeth of the zipper interlocking across the lips; circular face with a closed zipper replacing the mouth
fa-face-zipper.functionalityId: inserts a secretive or zipped-lips reaction emoji indicating silence; marks content with a confidential or keeping-quiet sentiment
fa-face-zipper.intentId: express secrecy, silence, or keeping something confidential; react with a zipped-lips gesture to indicate saying nothing

fa-falafel.appearanceId: round or oval falafel ball with a textured or dotted surface suggesting a fried chickpea patty; slightly flattened sphere with irregular surface markings
fa-falafel.functionalityId: represents a falafel food item or Middle Eastern dish; tags content with a vegetarian street food or restaurant category
fa-falafel.intentId: indicate falafel or Middle Eastern food content; select a vegetarian food item in a menu or recipe

fa-family.appearanceId: group of human silhouettes of different heights suggesting adults and children standing together; two or more person figures arranged side by side representing a family unit
fa-family.functionalityId: represents a family group or household unit; tags content with a family or household category
fa-family.intentId: indicate family or group household content; select a family-themed element in a profile or settings view

fa-family-dress.appearanceId: group of human silhouettes including a figure wearing a dress or skirt shape alongside other family member figures; person figures with at least one in a feminine dress silhouette
fa-family-dress.functionalityId: represents a family unit including members in feminine dress; tags content with a household or family-with-dress category
fa-family-dress.intentId: indicate a family group with gender-diverse or feminine-attired members; select a family representation including dress-wearing figures

fa-family-pants.appearanceId: group of human silhouettes all wearing pants or trousers, including taller adult figures and shorter child figures; person figures with visible leg outlines suggesting pants-clad family members
fa-family-pants.functionalityId: represents a family unit with all members shown in pants or trousers; tags content with a household or family-in-pants category
fa-family-pants.intentId: indicate a family group represented with pants-wearing figures; select a family representation using trouser-clad silhouettes

fa-fan.appearanceId: circular fan with several evenly spaced curved or angled blades radiating from a central hub; spinning ventilation blade assembly viewed from the front
fa-fan.functionalityId: toggles a fan, ventilation, or cooling system on or off; navigates to climate or airflow control settings
fa-fan.intentId: control a fan or ventilation device; access cooling or air circulation settings

fa-fan-table.appearanceId: small desk or table fan with a rounded blade guard, circular front grille, and a short base or stand below; compact personal fan silhouette on a pedestal
fa-fan-table.functionalityId: represents a table fan or personal desktop cooling device; toggles or navigates to a desk fan or small appliance control
fa-fan-table.intentId: control a desk or table fan; access personal cooling appliance settings

fa-farm.appearanceId: barn or farmhouse silhouette with a pitched roof, large door opening, and possibly a silo or fence element nearby; rural agricultural building outline
fa-farm.functionalityId: represents a farm, agricultural property, or rural location; navigates to farm management or agricultural settings
fa-farm.intentId: indicate farming or agricultural content; access farm management tools or rural property information

fa-fast-forward.appearanceId: two right-pointing triangles or chevrons side by side forming a double-arrow fast-forward symbol; paired forward-facing arrowheads indicating increased playback speed
fa-fast-forward.functionalityId: advances media playback to a faster speed or skips ahead; jumps forward in a video, audio, or timeline
fa-fast-forward.intentId: skip ahead in media or increase playback speed; advance past content to reach a later point quickly

fa-faucet.appearanceId: side-profile tap or faucet silhouette with a handle on top and a spout curving downward; water tap outline with a lever or knob handle above the nozzle
fa-faucet.functionalityId: represents a water faucet or plumbing fixture; navigates to water usage, utility, or plumbing settings
fa-faucet.intentId: manage water supply or plumbing fixture settings; indicate water access or utility controls

fa-faucet-drip.appearanceId: side-profile tap or faucet silhouette with a small water droplet shape hanging below the spout tip; water tap outline with a dripping teardrop at the nozzle end
fa-faucet-drip.functionalityId: indicates a dripping faucet or water leak alert; represents water waste or a plumbing drip notification
fa-faucet-drip.intentId: report or identify a water leak or dripping faucet; address a plumbing drip or water conservation issue

fa-fax.appearanceId: rectangular fax machine body with a paper tray or slot on top and a keypad or button area on the front face; office document transmission device silhouette with a paper feed slot
fa-fax.functionalityId: sends or receives a fax document; navigates to fax transmission settings or contact fax information
fa-fax.intentId: send or receive a fax document; access fax communication or document transmission features

fa-feather.appearanceId: a single elongated feather with a central quill spine and tapering barbs fanning out symmetrically on both sides; slim leaf-like plume with a pointed tip and narrow stem
fa-feather.functionalityId: represents a writing, poetry, or lightweight content mode; activates a note-taking or creative writing feature
fa-feather.intentId: access writing tools or a lightweight content creation mode; indicate poetry, authorship, or creative writing

fa-feather-alt.appearanceId: an alternate feather shape with a pen-tip or quill point at the base suggesting a writing quill; elongated plume with barbs and a sharpened nib at the bottom end
fa-feather-alt.functionalityId: activates a quill pen or stylized writing mode; represents authorship, drafting, or editorial actions
fa-feather-alt.intentId: use a quill or stylized pen for writing or signing; indicate authorship or a classic writing instrument tool

fa-female.appearanceId: standing human figure silhouette with a circular head, torso, and a flared skirt or dress shape below the waist; person outline with a feminine dress or triangular lower body
fa-female.functionalityId: filters or selects content categorized as female or feminine; represents a woman or girl figure in a demographic or profile field
fa-female.intentId: indicate or filter by a female gender category; select a feminine figure in a profile or demographic selector

fa-fence.appearanceId: a horizontal row of vertical fence posts or pickets connected by horizontal rails; repeating vertical slats with a crossbar forming a fence panel
fa-fence.functionalityId: represents a fence boundary or property perimeter; tags content with a yard, property line, or barrier category
fa-fence.intentId: indicate a fence, boundary, or property perimeter element; mark a separation or enclosure in a landscape or map view

fa-ferris-wheel.appearanceId: large circular wheel with evenly spaced gondola or car shapes hanging around its circumference and spokes radiating from a central hub; amusement park observation wheel silhouette
fa-ferris-wheel.functionalityId: represents a ferris wheel ride or amusement park attraction; tags a location or event with a fairground or carnival category
fa-ferris-wheel.intentId: indicate an amusement park or carnival attraction; find or select a ferris wheel ride location

fa-ferry.appearanceId: side-profile boat or ferry vessel with a flat deck, enclosed cabin structure, and hull shape; water transport ship silhouette with a rectangular superstructure
fa-ferry.functionalityId: represents a ferry boat or water transport route; navigates to ferry schedules, routes, or marine transit information
fa-ferry.intentId: find or use a ferry boat service or water crossing route; access marine transit schedules or vessel information

fa-field-hockey.appearanceId: a field hockey stick with a curved hooked end at the bottom and a long straight handle, alongside or near a small round ball; J-shaped sports stick with a rounded hook and a ball
fa-field-hockey.functionalityId: represents a field hockey sport or activity; tags content with a field hockey or stick sport category
fa-field-hockey.intentId: indicate field hockey sport content or activities; select a field hockey game or equipment element

fa-fighter-jet.appearanceId: side-profile military fighter jet silhouette with swept-back delta wings, a pointed nose cone, and tail fins; sleek angular aircraft body with swept wings and exhaust nozzle
fa-fighter-jet.functionalityId: represents a fighter jet or military aircraft; tags content with an aviation, defense, or fast-travel category
fa-fighter-jet.intentId: indicate military aviation or high-speed flight content; select a fighter jet or defense aircraft element

fa-file.appearanceId: rectangular document page outline with a folded upper-right corner creating a dog-ear; standard paper sheet silhouette with a triangular corner fold
fa-file.functionalityId: opens, creates, or represents a generic file or document; attaches or links to a file resource in a form or upload area
fa-file.intentId: access or manage a file or document; open a generic file for viewing or editing

fa-file-alt.appearanceId: rectangular document page outline with a folded upper-right corner and two or three short horizontal lines inside representing text content; paper sheet with a dog-ear corner and stacked text lines
fa-file-alt.functionalityId: opens or represents a text-based document or alternative file format; displays a file with visible text content indicators
fa-file-alt.intentId: view or access a text document or alternate file format; open a file that contains readable text content

fa-file-audio.appearanceId: rectangular document page outline with a folded upper-right corner and a musical note or speaker/sound wave symbol inside; paper sheet with a dog-ear and an audio indicator glyph
fa-file-audio.functionalityId: opens or attaches an audio file such as MP3 or WAV; represents a sound recording or audio document
fa-file-audio.intentId: access or play an audio file or sound recording; attach or manage an audio document

fa-file-award.appearanceId: rectangular document page outline with a folded upper-right corner and a ribbon or medal badge symbol inside; paper sheet with a dog-ear and an award or certification emblem
fa-file-award.functionalityId: opens or represents a certificate, award, or credential document; attaches an achievement or accreditation file
fa-file-award.intentId: access or share a certificate or award document; view or store a credential or achievement file

fa-file-binary.appearanceId: rectangular document page outline with a folded upper-right corner and binary digits or ones and zeros inside; paper sheet with a dog-ear and a binary code pattern
fa-file-binary.functionalityId: represents a binary or compiled executable file; opens or manages a low-level binary data document
fa-file-binary.intentId: access or handle a binary file or compiled data; manage raw binary document content

fa-file-cad.appearanceId: rectangular document page outline with a folded upper-right corner and a CAD or technical drawing symbol such as geometric lines or a drafting shape inside; paper sheet with a dog-ear and a computer-aided design indicator
fa-file-cad.functionalityId: opens or represents a CAD drawing or technical design file; attaches or links to an engineering or architectural document
fa-file-cad.intentId: access or manage a CAD or technical drawing file; view or edit an engineering or architectural design document

fa-file-caret-down.appearanceId: rectangular document page outline with a folded upper-right corner and a downward-pointing caret or chevron inside; paper sheet with a dog-ear and a down-arrow indicator
fa-file-caret-down.functionalityId: expands or downloads content associated with a file; collapses or scrolls down within a file-related panel
fa-file-caret-down.intentId: expand or download content from a file entry; scroll down or reveal more in a file-linked section

fa-file-caret-up.appearanceId: rectangular document page outline with a folded upper-right corner and an upward-pointing caret or chevron inside; paper sheet with a dog-ear and an up-arrow indicator
fa-file-caret-up.functionalityId: collapses or uploads content associated with a file; scrolls up or minimizes a file-related panel
fa-file-caret-up.intentId: collapse or upload content for a file entry; scroll up or minimize a file-linked section

fa-file-chart-line.appearanceId: rectangular document page outline with a folded upper-right corner and a line chart or trend graph drawn inside; paper sheet with a dog-ear and an upward-trending line graph
fa-file-chart-line.functionalityId: opens or represents a file containing a line chart or trend report; attaches a data analytics or performance document
fa-file-chart-line.intentId: access or share a line chart report or analytics document; view trend data contained in a file

fa-file-chart-pie.appearanceId: rectangular document page outline with a folded upper-right corner and a pie chart or circular segmented graph inside; paper sheet with a dog-ear and a divided circle chart
fa-file-chart-pie.functionalityId: opens or represents a file containing a pie chart or distribution report; attaches a data breakdown or proportion document
fa-file-chart-pie.intentId: access or share a pie chart report or distribution document; view proportional data contained in a file

fa-file-check.appearanceId: rectangular document page outline with a folded upper-right corner and a checkmark symbol inside; paper sheet with a dog-ear and a tick or check glyph
fa-file-check.functionalityId: marks a file as reviewed, approved, or completed; indicates that a document has passed a verification check
fa-file-check.intentId: confirm that a file has been reviewed or approved; mark a document as verified or complete

fa-file-circle-check.appearanceId: rectangular document page outline with a folded upper-right corner and a small circle containing a checkmark overlaid at the lower-right; paper sheet with a dog-ear and a circular confirmation badge
fa-file-circle-check.functionalityId: confirms that a file has been successfully processed or verified; marks a document with a completed or approved status badge
fa-file-circle-check.intentId: verify that a file has been successfully completed or confirmed; check the approval status of a document

fa-file-circle-exclamation.appearanceId: rectangular document page outline with a folded upper-right corner and a small circle containing an exclamation mark overlaid at the lower-right; paper sheet with a dog-ear and a circular warning badge
fa-file-circle-exclamation.functionalityId: alerts the user to a file with an error, warning, or required action; marks a document as needing attention or containing an issue
fa-file-circle-exclamation.intentId: investigate a file error or warning that requires attention; address an issue flagged on a document

fa-file-circle-info.appearanceId: rectangular document page outline with a folded upper-right corner and a small circle containing an information mark or lowercase i overlaid at the lower-right; paper sheet with a dog-ear and a circular info badge
fa-file-circle-info.functionalityId: opens additional information or metadata details for a file; displays an informational tooltip or description for a document
fa-file-circle-info.intentId: view more details or metadata about a specific file; access informational context for a document
